content.json:
# 🎯 SecurityInsight — Risk Analysis   `workbook template v2.1.107`

Ranked risk findings from `SI_RiskAnalysis_Summary_CL` + `SI_RiskAnalysis_Detailed_CL` with live filters. All tiles respect the pills below.

- **Workspace** pill binds every tile to the LA workspace you pick once — no per-query picker.
- **TraceID** is a deterministic SHA-256 of `TraceName` — same finding = same ID every run. Group by TraceID to track history.
- **CollectionTime** is uniform across every row of a single run. Filter to the latest run with the toggle below.
- **Multi-select dropdowns default to `*` (All).** Leave `*` selected to see everything; tick specific values (and untick `*`) to narrow. (KQL guard: `where '*' in ({Param}) or Col in ({Param})`.)

> 💡 **Workbook template v2.1.107** — bump matches the SecurityInsight release that shipped this JSON. Compare to the *Data powered by* footer at the bottom to see which engine version actually wrote the rows you're looking at.

parameters.name: LatestRunOnly
parameters.label: Latest run only

parameters.name: SecurityDomain
parameters.label: Security domain
parameters.query:
union (print SecurityDomain='*'), (SI_RiskAnalysis_Summary_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | distinct SecurityDomain)
| extend _sort = iff(SecurityDomain == '*', 0, 1)
| order by _sort asc, SecurityDomain asc
| project SecurityDomain

parameters.name: SecuritySeverity
parameters.label: Severity
parameters.query:
union (print SecuritySeverity='*'), (SI_RiskAnalysis_Summary_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | distinct SecuritySeverity)
| extend _sort = iff(SecuritySeverity == '*', 0, 1)
| order by _sort asc, SecuritySeverity asc
| project SecuritySeverity

parameters.name: CriticalityTier
parameters.label: Criticality tier
parameters.query:
union (print CriticalityTier='*'), (SI_RiskAnalysis_Summary_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | distinct CriticalityTier = tostring(CriticalityTier))
| extend _sort = iff(CriticalityTier == '*', 0, 1)
| order by _sort asc, CriticalityTier asc
| project CriticalityTier

parameters.name: SubCategory
parameters.label: Subcategory
parameters.query:
union (print Subcategory='*'), (SI_RiskAnalysis_Summary_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | distinct Subcategory)
| extend _sort = iff(Subcategory == '*', 0, 1)
| order by _sort asc, Subcategory asc
| project Subcategory

content.query:
SI_RiskAnalysis_Summary_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '*' in ({SecurityDomain})   or SecurityDomain   in ({SecurityDomain})
| where '*' in ({SecuritySeverity}) or SecuritySeverity in ({SecuritySeverity})
| where '*' in ({CriticalityTier})  or tostring(CriticalityTier) in ({CriticalityTier})
| where '*' in ({SubCategory})      or Subcategory      in ({SubCategory})
| where ('{SearchText}' == '') or ConfigurationName contains '{SearchText}' or TraceName contains '{SearchText}'
| summarize TotalRiskScore = sum(todouble(RiskScoreTotal)), OpenFindings = count_distinct(TraceID) by CollectionTime
| order by CollectionTime asc
content.title: Total risk score + open findings over time

content.query:
SI_RiskAnalysis_Summary_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '*' in ({SecurityDomain})   or SecurityDomain   in ({SecurityDomain})
| where '*' in ({SecuritySeverity}) or SecuritySeverity in ({SecuritySeverity})
| where '*' in ({CriticalityTier})  or tostring(CriticalityTier) in ({CriticalityTier})
| where '*' in ({SubCategory})      or Subcategory      in ({SubCategory})
| where ('{SearchText}' == '') or ConfigurationName contains '{SearchText}' or TraceName contains '{SearchText}'
| summarize TotalRisk = sum(todouble(RiskScoreTotal)) by CollectionTime, SecurityDomain
| order by CollectionTime asc
content.title: Risk by SecurityDomain over time

content.query:
SI_RiskAnalysis_Summary_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '*' in ({SecurityDomain})   or SecurityDomain   in ({SecurityDomain})
| where '*' in ({SecuritySeverity}) or SecuritySeverity in ({SecuritySeverity})
| where '*' in ({CriticalityTier})  or tostring(CriticalityTier) in ({CriticalityTier})
| where '*' in ({SubCategory})      or Subcategory      in ({SubCategory})
| where ('{SearchText}' == '') or ConfigurationName contains '{SearchText}' or TraceName contains '{SearchText}'
| summarize TotalRisk = sum(todouble(RiskScoreTotal)) by CollectionTime, CriticalityTier_s = tostring(CriticalityTier)
| order by CollectionTime asc
content.title: Risk by CriticalityTier over time

content.query:
let _runs =
    SI_RiskAnalysis_Summary_CL
    | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
    | where '*' in ({SecurityDomain})   or SecurityDomain   in ({SecurityDomain})
    | where '*' in ({SecuritySeverity}) or SecuritySeverity in ({SecuritySeverity})
    | where '*' in ({CriticalityTier})  or tostring(CriticalityTier) in ({CriticalityTier})
    | where '*' in ({SubCategory})      or Subcategory      in ({SubCategory})
    | where ('{SearchText}' == '') or ConfigurationName contains '{SearchText}' or TraceName contains '{SearchText}'
    | summarize TraceIDs = make_set(TraceID) by CollectionTime
    | order by CollectionTime asc
    | extend PrevIDs = prev(TraceIDs), PrevRun = prev(CollectionTime)
    | where isnotempty(PrevRun);
_runs
| extend New      = toint(array_length(set_difference(TraceIDs, PrevIDs)))
| extend Resolved = toint(array_length(set_difference(PrevIDs, TraceIDs)))
| extend Net      = New - Resolved
| project CollectionTime, New, Resolved, Net
| order by CollectionTime asc
content.title: New vs resolved findings per run

content.query:
let _Latest = toscalar(SI_RiskAnalysis_Summary_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize max(CollectionTime));
SI_RiskAnalysis_Summary_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where (tobool('{LatestRunOnly}') == false) or CollectionTime == _Latest
| where '*' in ({SecurityDomain})   or SecurityDomain   in ({SecurityDomain})
| where '*' in ({SecuritySeverity}) or SecuritySeverity in ({SecuritySeverity})
| where '*' in ({CriticalityTier})  or tostring(CriticalityTier) in ({CriticalityTier})
| where '*' in ({SubCategory})      or Subcategory      in ({SubCategory})
| where ('{SearchText}' == '') or ConfigurationName contains '{SearchText}' or TraceName contains '{SearchText}'
| extend RiskScoreTotal = todouble(RiskScoreTotal)
| top toint('{TopN}') by RiskScoreTotal desc
| project TraceID, TraceName, SecurityDomain, Category, Subcategory, ConfigurationName, SecuritySeverity, CriticalityTierLevel, RiskScoreTotal, AssetCount = toint(AssetCount), TotalIssues = toint(TotalIssues), ImpactedAssets
content.title: Top {TopN} findings by risk score

content.json:
## Stale findings — open for a while
Findings present on the latest run AND at least one earlier run in the time range. `DaysOpen` = span between first + last appearance.

content.query:
let _Latest = toscalar(SI_RiskAnalysis_Summary_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize max(CollectionTime));
let _OpenNow =
    SI_RiskAnalysis_Summary_CL
    | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and CollectionTime == _Latest
    | where '*' in ({SecurityDomain})   or SecurityDomain   in ({SecurityDomain})
    | where '*' in ({SecuritySeverity}) or SecuritySeverity in ({SecuritySeverity})
    | where '*' in ({CriticalityTier})  or tostring(CriticalityTier) in ({CriticalityTier})
    | where '*' in ({SubCategory})      or Subcategory      in ({SubCategory})
    | where ('{SearchText}' == '') or ConfigurationName contains '{SearchText}' or TraceName contains '{SearchText}'
    | distinct TraceID;
SI_RiskAnalysis_Summary_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where TraceID in (_OpenNow)
| summarize
    FirstSeen   = min(CollectionTime),
    LastSeen    = max(CollectionTime),
    Appearances = count_distinct(CollectionTime),
    MaxRisk     = max(todouble(RiskScoreTotal)),
    AnyTrace    = any(TraceName),
    AnyConfig   = any(ConfigurationName),
    AnySeverity = any(SecuritySeverity)
    by TraceID
| extend DaysOpen = datetime_diff('day', LastSeen, FirstSeen)
| where Appearances > 1
| project TraceID, TraceName = AnyTrace, ConfigurationName = AnyConfig, SecuritySeverity = AnySeverity, FirstSeen, LastSeen, DaysOpen, Appearances, MaxRisk
| order by DaysOpen desc, MaxRisk desc
content.title: Stale findings (multi-run persistence in the time range)

content.json:
## Identity inventory — latest collection
Pulls from `SI_IdentityAssets_CL` (Workspace pill above drives the binding). Column-filter rows by `IsPrivileged` / `IsStale` / `IsExternal` / etc.

content.query:
let _Latest = toscalar(SI_IdentityAssets_CL | summarize max(CollectionTime));
SI_IdentityAssets_CL
| where CollectionTime == _Latest
| project
    CollectionTime,
    SolutionVersion,
    ObjectType,
    DisplayName,
    UserPrincipalName,
    EffectiveTier,
    IsPrivileged,
    IsPrivilegedEligible,
    IsStale,
    MFARegistered,
    AccountEnabled,
    IsExternal,
    IsShadowAdmin,
    IsBreakGlass,
    EntraID_Roles,
    EntraID_AppPermissions,
    Azure_Delegations
content.title: Latest identity collection

content.json:
---
### Data powered by
_Every RiskAnalysis row is stamped with the engine version that produced it (`SolutionVersion` column). The tile below shows which version the latest ingest was written by — use it to confirm customer VMs are running the expected release._
